title: Good: IPv6 packet parsing is clean and RFC-compliant
description:
src/lichen/ipv6/packet.py and udp.py are well-implemented:
- Clean dataclass design with from_bytes/to_bytes symmetry
- Proper validation with actionable error messages
- Correct pseudo-header checksum calculation (RFC 768, 8200)
- Clear separation of header vs extension headers vs payload
- Explicit Fragment header rejection (LICHEN uses SCHC)

Worth defending against simplification attempts.
close_reason: Acknowledged positive review finding. Verified all 54 IPv6/UDP tests pass. Code quality confirmed: clean dataclass design, proper validation, RFC-compliant checksum calculation, explicit Fragment header rejection. No changes needed.
